A complete non-security fix artifact is preserved for the cluster, but implementation is blocked in this worker because the target checkout is a grafted main-only snapshot, `gh` is unavailable without `GH_TOKEN`, and fetching `clownfish/repair-51868-qr-rendering` from origin timed out.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair #93869 on `clownfish/repair-51868-qr-rendering` so QR/block-art copy preserves leading quiet-zone spaces after DOM parsing. Use a deterministic marked `data-code` representation only for block-art payloads, decode marked payloads immediately before clipboard copy, keep raw payload compatibility, and add focused DOM plus clipboard-handler coverage.
repair_candidate.pr_title: UI: render half-block QR output in web chat
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repairs the existing #93869 QR/block-art path so leading quiet-zone spaces survive rendered DOM parsing and clipboard copy.
- Encodes only detected block-art `data-code` payloads with a deterministic marker, decodes marked payloads before `copyToClipboard`, and keeps existing raw payloads supported.
- Updates focused markdown/chat tests to prove rendered code blocks and clipboard payloads preserve the two leading spaces for normal and truncated QR art.

## Credit
This continues to carry forward the fix idea and reproduction from @emg110 in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/51868.

## Validation
- pnpm test ui/src/ui/markdown.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- git diff --check

## Notes
Do not edit unrelated prompt snapshots or ClawHub cleanup behavior; those failures are known current-main drift per the repair job.
credit_notes: Preserve #93869 as the canonical credited replacement PR.
Keep #51868 and @emg110 credited in the PR body and release-note context as the original report, implementation direction, and proof source.
Do not open a second replacement PR and do not alter #51868.
